## Architecture classification

- Primary ADRL ID: `ADRL-___-___`
- Secondary ADRL IDs: none
- Decision effect: `implements | adds evidence | changes | supersedes | none`
- Maturity transition: `D_ -> D_ | none`
- Evidence produced:
- Architectural non-goals:

Replace every placeholder and select exactly one decision effect. Use `none`
only as the completed value, not as one option in an unchanged option list.

The primary ID is required for every pull request; maintenance and governance
work normally maps to `FND`, `EVL`, or `OPS`. Changes to an accepted decision or
the frozen taxonomy must update `docs/adr-index.md` in the same pull request.
